---
title: "Pmdf3_cleaning"
format: html
---

```{r}
# Load required libraries 
library(dplyr)

# Key column mappings for this dataset:
#   tissue type        -> QC_pass_ancestry (no tissue_type column)
#   sex discrepancy    -> QC_pass_sexcheck (TRUE = pass, FALSE = fail)
#   phenotype          -> phenotype (ALS / Control / Other)
#   age at blood draw  -> NOT PRESENT (will skip)
#   CYP2D6 unknown     -> Cyrius_phenotype == "unknown"
#   cohort             -> cohort
#   age at onset       -> age_at_onset_years
#   survival time      -> survival_months
#   event              -> survival_status (dead / alive)
#   site of onset      -> site_of_onset (Spinal / Bulbar / Generalized / FTD)

#   C9orf72 status     -> NOT PRESENT in this dataset

 
#helper function 
log_step <- function(label, df_before, df_after) {
  removed <- nrow(df_before) - nrow(df_after)
  cat(sprintf("  [%-55s] removed: %4d | remaining: %5d\n",
              label, removed, nrow(df_after)))
}
```


```{r}
# Load data
df_raw <- read.csv("Turkey_CYP_data_PMDF3.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

cat("=== RAW DATA ===\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(df_raw), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(df_raw), "\n\n")
```
```{r}

# BLOCK 1: RISK ANALYSIS CLEANING
# Steps:
#   1. Keep samples passing ancestry QC
#   2. Remove missing/non-ALS/Control phenotype
#   3. Remove samples failing sex check
#   4. Age at blood draw -- SKIPPED (column not present in this dataset)
#   5. Remove unknown CYP2D6 genotypes
#   6. Remove cohorts with only cases OR only controls

cat("BLOCK 1: RISK ANALYSIS CLEANING\n")

```

```{r}
df_risk <- df_raw

# -- Step 1: Keep samples passing ancestry QC 
# This dataset has no tissue_type column. Instead, QC_pass_ancestry flags
# samples that pass the ancestry principal component check.
df_before <- df_risk
df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  filter(QC_pass_ancestry == "TRUE")
log_step("Keep samples passing ancestry QC", df_before, df_risk)

# 3 removed

```

```{r}

#  Step 2: Remove missing/non-ALS/Control phenotype 
df_before <- df_risk
df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  filter(phenotype %in% c("ALS", "Control"))
log_step("Remove missing phenotype (keep ALS and Control only)", df_before, df_risk)

# 21 'Other', 1 missing
```

```{r}
# Step 3: Remove samples failing sex check 
# QC_pass_sexcheck == FALSE means reported sex does not match genetic sex
df_before <- df_risk
df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  filter(QC_pass_sexcheck == "TRUE")
log_step("Remove sex discrepancies (QC_pass_sexcheck)", df_before, df_risk)

# 8 removed
```

```{r}
# -- Step 4: Remove unknown CYP2D6 genotypes 
df_before <- df_risk
df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  filter(!is.na(Cyrius_phenotype),
         Cyrius_phenotype != "unknown",
         Cyrius_phenotype != "")
log_step("Remove unknown CYP2D6 effect genotypes", df_before, df_risk)

# 22 removed
```

```{r}
# -- Step 6: Remove cohorts with only cases OR only controls ------------------
df_before <- df_risk
cohort_counts <- df_risk %>%
  group_by(cohort) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cases    = sum(phenotype == "ALS",     na.rm = TRUE),
    n_controls = sum(phenotype == "Control", na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(n_cases > 0 & n_controls > 0)

df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  filter(cohort %in% cohort_counts$cohort)
log_step("Remove cohorts with only cases or only controls", df_before, df_risk)

cat("\n>>> RISK DATASET FINAL SIZE:", nrow(df_risk), "rows\n\n")

# 0 removed 
```

```{r}
#Summary statistics

colnames(df_risk)

summary_table <- df_risk %>%
  group_by(phenotype) %>%
  summarise(
    
    # Sample size
    n = n(),
    
    # Age (use blood draw if available, otherwise diagnosis)
    mean_age = mean(age_at_diagnosis_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_age   = sd(age_at_diagnosis_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # % Male
    pct_male = mean(sex_at_birth == "Male", na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    
    # CYP2D6 *4 allele frequency
    cyp2d6_4_freq = mean(
      Allele1 == "*4" | Allele2 == "*4",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    # Metaboliser phenotype percentages
        pct_PM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "PM",         na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_IM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "IM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_NM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "NM",       na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_UM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "UM",   na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1)
  )

summary_table <- summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    mean_age = round(mean_age, 1),
    sd_age   = round(sd_age, 1),
    pct_male = round(pct_male, 1),
    cyp2d6_4_freq = round(cyp2d6_4_freq, 3),
    pct_PM = round(pct_PM, 1),
    pct_IM = round(pct_IM, 1),
    pct_NM = round(pct_NM, 1),
    pct_UM = round(pct_UM, 1)
  )
print(summary_table)
```

```{r}
summary_table <- df_risk %>%
  group_by(phenotype) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    # Use age_at_onset for ALS, age_at_survival_check for controls
    mean_age = round(mean(coalesce(age_at_onset_years, 
                                   age_at_survival_check_years), na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    sd_age   = round(sd(coalesce(age_at_onset_years, 
                                  age_at_survival_check_years), na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    
    # % Male
    pct_male = round(mean(sex_at_birth == "male", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    
    #CYP2D6*4 allele frequency
    cyp2d6_4_freq = round(mean(Allele1 == "*4" | Allele2 == "*4", na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    
    #Metaboliser phenotype percentages
    pct_PM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "PM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_IM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "IM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_NM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "NM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_UM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "UM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1)
  )

print(summary_table)
```


```{r}
# Survival Analysis 
df_survival <- df_raw

# Step 1: Keep samples passing ancestry QC
df_before <- df_survival
df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  filter(QC_pass_ancestry == "TRUE")
log_step("Keep samples passing ancestry QC", df_before, df_survival)

```

```{r}
# Step 2: Keep ALS cases only
df_before <- df_survival
df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  filter(phenotype == "ALS")
log_step("Keep ALS cases only (remove controls)", df_before, df_survival)
```

```{r}
# -- Step 3: Remove samples failing sex check 
df_before <- df_survival
df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  filter(QC_pass_sexcheck == "TRUE")
log_step("Remove sex discrepancies (QC_pass_sexcheck)", df_before, df_survival)
```

```{r}
# Step 4: Remove missing age at onset 

df_before <- df_survival
df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_at_onset_years) & age_at_onset_years != "")
log_step("Remove missing age at onset", df_before, df_survival)
```

```{r}
# -- Step 5: Remove missing survival information 
# survival_months = time to event; survival_status = dead/alive (event indicator)
df_before <- df_survival
df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_months) & survival_months != "",
         !is.na(survival_status) & survival_status != "")
log_step("Remove missing survival information", df_before, df_survival)
```

```{r}
# -- Step 6: Remove unknown CYP2D6 genotypes 
df_before <- df_survival
df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  filter(!is.na(Cyrius_phenotype),
         Cyrius_phenotype != "unknown",
         Cyrius_phenotype != "")
log_step("Remove unknown CYP2D6 effect genotypes", df_before, df_survival)
```

```{r}
# -- Step 7: Remove site of onset == FTD 
df_before <- df_survival
df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  filter(is.na(site_of_onset) | site_of_onset != "FTD")
log_step("Remove site of onset == FTD", df_before, df_survival)

cat("\n>>> OVERALL SURVIVAL DATASET FINAL SIZE:", nrow(df_survival), "rows\n\n")
```

```{r}

#Summary statistics

survival_table <- df_survival %>%
  group_by(phenotype) %>%
  summarise(
    
    # Sample size
    n = n(),
    
    # Use age_at_onset for ALS
    mean_age = round(mean(coalesce(age_at_onset_years,
                                   age_at_survival_check_years), na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    sd_age   = round(sd(coalesce(age_at_onset_years,
                                  age_at_survival_check_years), na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    # % Male
    pct_male = round(mean(sex_at_birth == "male", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    
    # CYP2D6 *4 allele frequency
    cyp2d6_4_freq = round(mean(Allele1 == "*4" | Allele2 == "*4", na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    
    # Metaboliser phenotype percentages
    pct_PM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "PM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_IM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "IM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_NM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "NM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    pct_UM = round(mean(Cyrius_phenotype == "UM", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1)
  )

print(survival_table)
```

```{r}
# SAVE CLEANED DATASETS
write.csv(df_risk,     "PMDF3_risk_cleaned.csv",     row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(df_survival, "PMDF3_survival_cleaned.csv",  row.names = FALSE)

table(df_risk$site_of_onset, useNA = "always")
table(df_survival$site_of_onset, useNA = "always")
```
